name: Cybergun S.A.
summary: Cybergun S.A. designs, manufactures, and distributes replica and dummy weapons for video game aficionados, sports or outdoor shootings, and collectors. It also offers air guns, paintballs, and BBs products, as well as various accessories, including optical sights, binoculars, scopes, goodies, battery chargers, goggles, gas/targets, belts, barrel extensions, adapters, bags, hard cases/handbags, racks, vests, mounts/rails, holsters/slings, bi-pods, batteries, flashlights, grenade launchers, ghillies, chargeurs, spray paints, upgrade parts, and ACU kits. The company provides its products under the Blackwater, Colt, Cybergun, Desert Eagle, Famas, Firepower, FN Herstal, GSG, Kahr-arms, Kalashnikov, Magpul, Mauser, sigpro, Mossberg, Schmeisser, Sig Sauer, Smith & Wesson, Swiss Arms, Tanfoglio, Taurus, and Thompson brands. It operates in Europe, the United States, and Asia. The company markets its products through wholesalers and specialty stores, such as gunsmiths, hunting and fishing stores, and toy and video game stores, as well as through distribution chains. The company was formerly known as Les 3 Pyl√É¬¥nes and changed its name to Cybergun S.A. in 1999. The company is headquartered in Bondoufle, France.
